redeem.meta.description.text: Ufumene ivawusha ye-Bitcoin ye-Lightning. Yithathe ngokukhawuleza usebenzisa isipaji se-Lightning.

redeem.meta.ogDescription.text: Kukho umntu ukuthumele ivawusha ye-Lightning. Yithathe ngokukhawuleza ngesipaji se-Bitcoin — awudingiyo i-akhawunti.

redeem.modal.lnaddr.body.text: Faka idilesi ye-Lightning okanye ikhowudi yentlawulo ye-LNURL ukuze ufumane iisathi ngokuthe ngqo esipajini sakho.

redeem.modal.sats.whatBody.text:
Izasatoshi ("iisathi") lilinganiso elincinci le-Bitcoin — njengama-centi ende e-randi.
Kukho i-100 000 000 yeesathi kwi-Bitcoin enye.
Unokuzigcina, ukwenza ngazo, okanye uzithumele kumntu wonke kwihlabathi ngoko nangoko.

redeem.modal.sats.li1.html: Fumana isipaji se-Bitcoin — khuphela uBlink (kunconywa kwabaqalayo) kwi-App Store okanye i-Play Store.

redeem.modal.sats.li2.html: Cofa "Bonisa ivawusha" kule phepha ukuze ubonise ikhowudi ye-QR.

redeem.modal.sats.li3.html: Skena okanye cofa ikhowudi ye-QR kwisicelo sesipaji sakho ukuze wamkele iisathi.

redeem.modal.sats.doBody.text:
Tshata kumashishini amaninzi, hlawula ii-akhawunti, thumela kubahlobo, okanye zigcine njengemali egciniweyo.
Jonga imephu yesipaji engezantsi ngeenkcukacha ezingakumbi.

redeem.state.expiredDesc.text: Le vawusha iphelelwe phambi kokuba ithathwe. Cela esinye kumthumeli.

redeem.state.unfundedDesc.text: Le vawusha ayikancinzelwanga ngeBitcoin. Buyela xa umthumeli eyilayishile.

redeem.lnaddr.emptyError.text: Nceda ufake idilesi ye-Lightning okanye ikhowudi ye-LNURL.

redeem.lnaddr.genericError.text: Kukho into engahambanga kakuhle. Nceda uzame kwakhona.

redeem.faq.blink.answer.html:
✅ Kulungile kwabaqalayo. Ukuseta kuphantsi, ukuqala ngokukhawuleza. Inombolo yakho yefowuni sisecwangi sakho.

Iinyathelo zokuqala

  1. Khuphela blink.sv Kwisi-Play Store, i-GitHub, okanye i-App Store.
    Play Store APK App Store
  2. Vula isicelo Cofa "Yenza i-akhawunti entsha" -> "Yamkela"
  3. Faka inombolo yakho yefowuni (ngokuzithandela) "SMS" -> "Sebenzisa i-SMS" -> Faka inombolo -> Cofa "Thumela nge-SMS". Le yisecwangi sakho. Qinisekisa ikhowudi enamadigi ayi-6.
  4. Buyela apha Cofa ikhowudi ye-QR ingasentla. Oku kuya kuvula uBlink aze ukuvumele ukuthatha i-bitcoin ⚡

redeem.faq.advancedBody.html:
• Misty Breez
    breez.technology/misty
    Play Store APK App Store
  • Phoenix
    phoenix.acinq.co Play Store APK App Store

redeem.faq.spend.lead.text: Sebenzisa i-Bitcoin nakuphi na — kwimarike zelali, ezikhulu izitolo, iikhadi zesipho, nentlawulo yehlabathi ngoko nangoko.

redeem.faq.spend.circlesBody.html:
Iiluntu eziphela apho unokuphila nge-Bitcoin: Witsand, iMossel Bay (bitcoinekasi.com), iPlettenberg Bay (bitcoinplett.cx), De Rust, Sedgefield, iStellenbosch, kunye ne-Knysna.
Zonke zinomxholo wemihlangano yelali eyenzeka rhoqo.

redeem.faq.spend.mapBody.html: BTCMap.org kunye ne- imephu yeMoney Badger zibonisa amashishini amaninzi awamkela i-Bitcoin kwihlabathi lonke leMzantsi Afrika.

redeem.faq.spend.zapperBody.html:
Hlawula kwisitolo esamkela iZapper okanye iScan to Pay — kubandakanywa
                  i-Pick & Pay, iDischem, iClicks, iEngen, iShell, iTotal, iWimpy kunye namaninzi.

redeem.faq.spend.giftBody.html: Thenga iikhadi zesipho zeemeko ezihlabathi kwi- Bitrefill.com — i-Netflix, i-Amazon, i-Uber, iitopu zelixa lomnxeba kunye nezinye.

redeem.faq.spend.meetupsBody.html:
Iiluntu eziphilileyo eKapa, ePretoria, naseRhawutini.
                  Fumanisa iziganeko kunye nemihla kwi-Twitter/X — khangela amaqela e-Bitcoin elalini yakho.

redeem.faq.spend.instantBody.text: Iintlawulo ze-Lightning ziyagqiba ngaphantsi kwesekendi, kwihlabathi liphela, ngeemali eziphantsi kakhulu.

redeem.faq.buyZa.a.html: Unokuthenga i-Bitcoin usebenzisa iinkonzo ezifana ne-54052.co.za, ezikuvumela ukuhlawula nge-EFT uze ufumane i-Bitcoin ngokuthe ngqo esipajini sakho. Khetha inkonzo elula, ethembekileyo, ekuvumela ukurhoxa esipajini sakho.

redeem.faq.bankZa.q.text: Ndingathumela njani i-Bitcoin kwi-akhawunti yasebhange eMzantsi Afrika?

redeem.faq.bankZa.a.html: Unokusebenzisa i-54052.co.za ukuze utshintshe i-Bitcoin zibe iirandi uzithumele ngokuthe ngqo kwi-akhawunti yasebhange eMzantsi Afrika. Kulula ukuyisebenzisa, kugxininisa kwi-Bitcoin, kwaye kukhonjiswe ukuhlawula ngokukhawuleza ngeemali eziphantsi.

redeem.faq.privacy.q.text: Kutheni ndisebenzise isipaji sam kunye nokukhathalela ubuqu obubodwa?

redeem.faq.privacy.a.html:
Xa i-Bitcoin yakho ikwitshange, awuyilawuli wena — litshange elilawula. Ii-akhawunti zinokubandakanywa, zilinganiselwa, okanye zilahleke ngenxa ye-hacks okanye ezinye iingxaki.

Iitshange ezininzi zifuna i-KYC (ukuqinisekisa ubume), eyinxibelelanisa isazisi sakho sangempela nomsebenzi wakho we-Bitcoin. Oku yakha irekhodi esisigxina seentlawulo zakho kwaye inciphisa ubuqu obubodwa bakho bezemali.

"Akuzizo iqhakuva zakho, akuzizo iintengo zakho." Ukusebenzisa isipaji sakho sikunika ulawulo olupheleleyo kwemali yakho kwaye kunceda ukukhusela ubuqu obubodwa. Phatha njengemali esandleni — wakuba nayo, igcine nawe.

redeem.faq.crypto.a.html:
I-Bitcoin yimali engahlukahlukenanga — akukho basunguli, inkampani, okanye ulawulo oluphakathi. Imimiselo imisiwe kwaye iyaphosiswa sisixeko sehlabathi liphela. Yayenzelwe ukususa ukuthembela kunye nokunika abantu ulawulo olupheleleyo kwemali yabo.

"I-crypto" yinto yonke enye — iiprojekthi ezinebasunguli, amaqela, kunye nabantu abangaphakathi abanokutshintsha imimiselo, bathinte umsinga, baze benze inzuzo ngokukhawuleza. Oku yenza zibe lula ukuzikhandla kwaye azifanele njengemali.

Iiprojekthi ze-crypto ezininzi azisoluli ingxaki eyintloko ye-fiat — ulawulo. Zishenxisa nje elo lawulo lusuka kurhulumente luye kwiinkampani okanye amaqela amancinane.

Iinkcubeko zingononopheli, kodwa ziyimvelaphi evulekileyo kwaye zinokwakhiwa kwi-Bitcoin ngaphandle kokufuna iitokeni ezahlukileyo. Iitokeni ngokwazo zivamile ukuba zingafunekiyo kwaye zikhona ukuze zityebise abantu abangaphakathi.

Imali idlalwa sisiphumo senethiwekhi — abantu bahlangana kwisiqwenga esinye. Imbono yethu ilula: I-Bitcoin yimali. I-crypto hayi. Ukuze sigcine uluntu lwethu luze kuphephile, sijonge kuphela kwi-Bitcoin kwaye siyigwema ngokupheleleyo i-crypto.

redeem.faq.lightning.q.text: Kutheni esi sixeko sisekela kuphela i-Lightning?

redeem.faq.lightning.a.html:
I-Lightning yingqungquthela yentlawulo ye-Bitcoin. Ivumela iintlawulo ngoko nangoko, iimali eziphantsi kakhulu, kwaye isebenza kwihlabathi liphela kwimizuzwana embalwa.

I-Bitcoin esesitsheni ilula kwaye ibiza kakhulu — ilunge kakhulu ukugcina. I-Lightning yenza i-Bitcoin ibe yinto esebenziseka yemihla ngemihla njengokuthumela imali encinane okanye ukuhlawula ezitolo.

Le platform isebenzisa i-Lightning ukwenza ukuthumela kwe-Bitcoin kube lula, ngokukhawuleza, kwaye kufumaneka kumntu wonke.

redeem.back.qrHint.text: Cofa okanye skena ikhowudi ye-QR ukuze uthathe
